summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SuperNetworkAI - Fixed critical backend FastAPI dependency injection bug, verified Google OAuth flow, tested AI-powered CV extraction, profile creation, dashboard functionality, and AI-powered search with semantic matching. LinkedIn URL extraction confirmed as failing.

resolved_bugs.issue: FastAPI dependency injection error causing 500 errors
resolved_bugs.fix: Added Depends() parameter to all endpoints using get_current_user()

ui_bugs.issue: Role intent dropdown selection has interaction issues in automated testing
ui_bugs.fix_priority: LOW - Manual testing works, automation issue only

integration_issues.issue: AI fails to extract Ikigai from LinkedIn URLs - returns JSON parsing error

passed_tests: Google OAuth authentication flow (redirect to auth.emergentagent.com)
AI Ikigai extraction with regular CV text (5/5 successful)
All auth-protected endpoints correctly return 401 when unauthenticated

action_item_for_main_agent.linkedin_url_extraction: Fix LinkedIn URL handling in AI Ikigai extraction - LLM returns invalid JSON when processing LinkedIn URLs
action_item_for_main_agent.profile_setup_dropdown: Minor: Investigate role intent dropdown interaction in ProfileSetup component for better automation testing support
